'''Korval Willic''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A resident of the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]], Korval claimed to spend all of his [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and time in the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]]. He was executed by his own grandson, [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] agent [[Vune Willic]].
